building_row.management_company: Not clearly disclosed in retrieved public leasing materials
building_row.open_questions: Verify whether the exact unit faces away from Sunset/Fairfax and retail activity. Confirm that the target unit truly has in-home washer/dryer, because the public Apartments.com page contains an internal contradiction. Confirm whether there is any real gym beyond the rooftop hot tub/lounge set, and get the full parking-fee stack in writing.
building_row.notes: Skyview Sunset has strong essentials on paper: central AC, dishwasher, in-home washer/dryer, pet-friendly terms, digital package lockers, controlled access/gated entry, covered parking, and EV charging are all visible in official or major-listing sources. The issue is quiet. The site is directly tied to Sunset and Fairfax, Urbanize describes a mixed-use project with retail at that corner, and public imagery/text emphasize skyline views and active neighborhood access rather than insulation from traffic. Amenity confidence is only medium because the building appears to offer a rooftop hot tub instead of a full pool and public materials do not show a gym, while Apartments.com also contains a contradictory FAQ saying there is no in-unit laundry even though the same listing and the official site say there is. With no renter reviews yet, this is not a reject, but it is too exposure-sensitive to promote to tour_candidate without unit-specific verification.

packet_markdown:
# Skyview Sunset building packet

## Snapshot
- Building ID: skyview-sunset-1511-n-fairfax-ave
- Address: 1511 N. Fairfax Ave, Los Angeles, CA 90046
- Primary URL: https://www.skyviewsunset.com/
- Management company: Not clearly disclosed in retrieved public leasing materials
- Recommended status: research_complete
- Last updated: 2026-03-25

## Scorecard
- Quiet: 2 (medium, evidence count 3)
- Management: 3 (low, evidence count 2)
- Amenity: 4 (medium, evidence count 5)
- Community stability: 3 (low, evidence count 2)
- Location fit: 4
- Pricing transparency: 3

## Risks
- Structural noise risk: medium
- Location noise risk: high
- Security risk: low
- Pricing risk: medium

## Evidence summary
- [official] The official amenities page confirms controlled access/gated entry, EV charging, digital package reception, covered parking, a rooftop sky deck, hot tub, central AC, dishwasher, and in-home washer/dryer. Source: Skyview Sunset amenities page (https://www.skyviewsunset.com/amenities). Note: The page lists Sky Deck Hot Tub, Sky Deck with Panoramic Views, Controlled Access/Gated, EV Charging Stations, Digital Package Reception, Covered Parking, In-Home Washer and Dryer, Central A/C and Heat, and Dishwasher.
- [official] The official pet policy is cat-friendly and dog-friendly with concrete disclosed terms. Source: Skyview Sunset amenities page (https://www.skyviewsunset.com/amenities). Note: Cats and dogs are welcome, max 2 pets, max 50 lbs per pet, $500 pet deposit per pet, and $50 monthly pet rent per pet.
- [official] Skyview Sunset sits at a high-exposure location near Sunset Boulevard and Fairfax Avenue, which materially raises daily traffic and street-noise risk. Source: Skyview Sunset official site (https://www.skyviewsunset.com/). Note: The official site repeatedly emphasizes the location near Fairfax Avenue and Sunset Boulevard and the lively center of the city.
- [news] Local development reporting describes the project as a mixed-use Sunset/Fairfax building with retail, which increases exposure to corner activity beyond a pure residential side street. Source: Urbanize LA (https://la.urbanize.city/post/mixed-use-development-rises-7901-w-sunset-boulevard-hollywood). Note: Urbanize reported a seven-story project at Sunset and Fairfax with 62 apartments, about 6,500 square feet of ground-floor retail, and 88 parking spaces.
- [review] Public operational history is still thin because the building is brand new and has no renter-review depth yet. Source: Apartments.com (https://www.apartments.com/skyview-sunset-los-angeles-ca/s011r94/). Note: Apartments.com lists the property as built in 2025 with 62 units/7 stories and says there are no renter reviews yet.
- [review] The visible listing gives a current available price and concession, but parking detail and some fee details still require direct confirmation. Source: Apartments.com (https://www.apartments.com/skyview-sunset-los-angeles-ca/s011r94/). Note: Apartments.com shows a currently available 2BR at $4,295 and says 1 Month Free is available, but also says to contact the property for parking details.
- [review] Zillow corroborates the core in-unit essentials and gated access, which helps resolve but not fully eliminate a contradictory Apartments.com FAQ about laundry. Source: Zillow Rentals (https://www.zillow.com/apartments/los-angeles-ca/skyview-on-sunset/CpRDfn/). Note: Zillow lists central AC, in-unit laundry, controlled access, dishwasher, EV charging, cats allowed, and small dogs allowed.

## Open questions
- Verify whether the exact unit faces away from Sunset/Fairfax and retail activity.
- Confirm that the target unit truly has in-home washer/dryer, because the public Apartments.com page contains an internal contradiction.
- Confirm whether there is any real gym and get the full parking-fee stack in writing.

## Notes
- Strong essentials and pet terms on paper, but not a slam-dunk quiet fit.
- Quiet and exposure are the main problems, not pricing or security.
- Needs unit-specific verification before it graduates from research_complete.
